Name: Jessica BASIC: Task Management Ontology
Description: A real-world workflow demonstrating task management, agent assignments, and basic aggregations.

ProjectSettings.Name: baseId
ProjectSettings.Description: Airtable base ID for this ontology (hardcoded per project)

ProjectTranspilers.Name: airtabletorulebook
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Pull rulebook from Airtable (optional; edit jessica-basic-rulebook.json directly if preferred) [DISABLED: rulebook JSON is authoritative; re-enable only with explicit user consent]

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktoairtable
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Reverse-sync: push rulebook changes back to Airtable (optional)

ProjectTranspilers.Name: rulebooktopostgres
ProjectTranspilers.Description: Generate Postgres schema + seed data from the rulebook
